entity.label: Bilhah
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Faltering; bashful, Rachel’s handmaid, whom she gave to Jacob (Gen. 29:29). She was the mother of Dan and Naphtali (Gen. 30:3-8). Reuben was cursed by his father for committing adultry with her (35:22; 49:4). He was deprived of the birth-right, which was given to the sons of Joseph.

verses.text: And at Bilhah, and at Ezem, and at Tolad,
